subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the significance of the Battle of Haldighati?
A_en: Battle of Haldighati was a decisive victory for the Mughal Empire.
A_hi: हल्दिघट के भूमिका मुग्ल्री का निष्कर्षण के भूमिका थी।
B_en: The battle of Haldighati marked the beginning of the Mughal Empire's decline.
B_hi: हल्दिघट राजनी के निर्वास के भूमिका थी।
C_en: The Battle of Haldighati is famous for its significant contribution to the growth of the Rajasthan state.
C_hi: हल्दिघट के भूमिका राजस्थान के विक्रमा के भूमिका थी।
D_en: The Battle of Haldighati is remembered for the bravery displayed by the Rajasthan army.
D_hi: हल्दिघट के भूमिका राजस्थान के आरोहर के भूमिका थी।
E_en: The Battle of Haldighati is renowned for its impact on the political landscape of Rajasthan.
E_hi: हल्दिघट के भूमिका राजस्थान के प्राचीनी संतुल थी।
